positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a nocturnal forest grove, viewed through a heavy dew filter. The central subject is a group of bioluminescent, abstractly geometric flora and fauna forms (mushrooms, moths, stylized fox tails) clustered on the forest floor. Use high-contrast etching ink aesthetics mixed with glowing neon accents. Deep sapphire blues, rich emerald greens, and pops of electric cyan and warm gold. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes against a dark, moody background. Overhead, a crescent moon is visible, casting dramatic spotlight shadows. Suitable for repeating apparel print, vector-like quality, highly detailed linework, deep depth of field, perfect symmetry, cinematic lighting, maximalist yet balanced composition.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, noise, artifacts, low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, gradient wash, photorealistic, messy lines
